chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sanctity and Virtue of Medina

text: 3150 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : «أَنَّ مَا بَيْنَ لاَبَتَيْهَا مَا بَيْنَ اَلصَّوْرَيْنِ إِلَى اَلثَّنِيَّةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3150 - It is narrated in another report:
"The area between the two lava plains (labatayha) is what lies between as-Sawrayn and ath-Thaniyyah."
